dsl_rule.translation_notes: Short Black Candle pattern translated using lower_wick < body to represent 'shadow shorter than body height'. Shadow interpreted as lower wick for short candles. Pattern is context-dependent per source material - performs as reversal in bull markets with upward breakout (7.98%) and downward breakout (11.86%). Entry triggered on pattern formation (short candle with small lower shadow). Exit uses close reversal above previous close as reasonable default for author-silent exit condition. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as performance varies significantly by market regime and breakout direction.

source_rule_text: Short Black Candle: A candlestick pattern where the shadow should be shorter than the height of the body
